description: Deconstruction phases — operational sequence for full-house residential deconstruction. Reverse of construction sequence with pre/post logistics phases.

phases.name: Pre-Deconstruction
phases.duration: 2–4 hours (day before or morning of Day 1)
phases.description: Site preparation, utility isolation, hazmat survey, permits, crane setup, crew briefing.

humanoidBridge.note: Maps to humanoid-ontology utility isolation + hazmat survey phases

phases.name: Roof Deconstruction
phases.description: Section-cut roof into 4–6 pieces, crane-lift to ground, disassemble in reverse order: shingles → underlayment → sheathing → rafters → hardware.
phases.safetyFocus: 100% fall protection tie-off, crane lift plan, 20ft power-line clearance, <20mph wind

phases.name: Wall Deconstruction
phases.duration: 8–12 hours (Day 1 soft strip parallel + Day 2 structural)
phases.description: Soft strip interiors (cabinets, fixtures, trim, windows) while crane works roof. Then crane-lift wall sections on sides for ground disassembly: drywall → insulation → sheathing → studs → siding.
phases.prerequisite: ROOF (structural) | PRE (soft strip starts parallel with ROOF)
phases.safetyFocus: Dust control (drywall/insulation), load path awareness during section removal, PPE for fiberglass

phases.name: Floor System Deconstruction
phases.description: Brace lower walls (diaphragm loss), cut subfloor along joist lines, cut joists at bearing points, rig at 1/3 points, crane-lift sections on sides. Ground disassembly: subfloor → bridging → joists → rim joist → hardware.
phases.prerequisite: WALLS (structural removal complete above floor line)
phases.safetyFocus: Diaphragm bracing BEFORE floor removal (critical), depth-set circular saw (subfloor thickness only)

phases.name: Foundation Deconstruction
phases.duration: 2–4 days (currently exceeds 2-day window — Track Breaker R&D target)
phases.description: Saw-cut wall panels into 4x8 sections, core-drill lifting holes, Brokk breaks bond at footing joint, crane lifts panels. Walk-behind slab saw cuts grid. Brokk crushes footings. Rebar bundled for scrap.
phases.safetyFocus: 160–190 tons concrete, section weight management (3,200 lbs/panel), dust suppression, rebar exposure
phases.rdNote: Track Breaker (V0–V3) is the R&D product targeting Phase 4 bottleneck. Crew-portable, wall-mounted hydraulic breaking system. Patent scope: no commercial precedent.

phases.name: Post-Deconstruction
phases.description: Material staging into BOH zones, site cleanup, final magnetic sweep, grade/backfill, equipment breakdown, crew debrief, data capture.
phases.safetyFocus: Final nail sweep, site security, material inventory verification

humanoidBridge.note: Maps to humanoid-ontology cleaning/protection phase — same primitives (sweep, sort, organize, carry)
